dict.string: en
J.A.R.V.I.S.
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
JARVIS
APPL
JARVIS syncs your health data (steps, heart rate, sleep, workouts) to provide personalized wellness insights and recommendations.
JARVIS uses your location continuously to provide contextual assistance, weather updates, and navigation — even when the app is in the background.
JARVIS uses your location in the background to provide proactive contextual updates.
JARVIS uses your location to provide contextual assistance and navigation.
JARVIS needs access to your reminders to help manage your tasks.
JARVIS needs access to your calendar to help manage your schedule.
JARVIS needs full access to reminders to create, read, and complete tasks for you.
JARVIS needs full access to your calendar to create and manage events for you.
JARVIS needs access to your contacts to help you communicate and look up people.
JARVIS needs access to your music library to play songs and manage playback.
JARVIS needs microphone access for voice commands and voice chat.
JARVIS uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice commands.
LaunchBackground
Dark
